0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Scratchpad Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Ephemeral scratchpad for transient, in-session notes. Simple write/read/clear pattern."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How It Works"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The scratchpad stores a single mutable string per bank. Calling ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_write"}]," replaces it. No history — it's a sticky note, not a log."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"API"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Method"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_write(content=...)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Replace the scratchpad string"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_read()"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Get the current scratchpad string"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_clear()"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Empty the scratchpad"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Write a note\nmnemosyne_scratchpad_write(content=\"User's name is Alice, works at Acme Corp\")\n\n# Read it back\nmnemosyne_scratchpad_read()\n# Returns: \"User's name is Alice, works at Acme Corp\"\n\n# Clear when done\nmnemosyne_scratchpad_clear()\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Use task)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporary state"}],": Multi-step calculation results that don't need permanent
